# Assessment Overview

This index lists the supplementary assessment fact documents available for this report.

## Available Documents

- [dependency-map.md](./dependency-map.md) - Dependency map grouped by modernization-relevant dependency categories.
- [data-architecture.md](./data-architecture.md) - Persistence model, ER diagram, and data ownership documentation.
- [business-workflows.md](./business-workflows.md) - Core business workflows, sequence, and decision logic documentation.
- [api-service-contracts.md](./api-service-contracts.md) - API endpoint inventory and service communication contract summary.
- [architecture-diagram.md](./architecture-diagram.md) - High-level and component-level application architecture diagrams.
- [configuration-inventory.md](./configuration-inventory.md) - Configuration sources, profiles, settings, and runtime inventory.
